name: Delighted NPS & CX Survey API
what_it_does: Delighted REST API for NPS (Net Promoter Score) and customer experience survey platform. Enables AI agents to send survey requests, retrieve survey responses and scores, access NPS trend data, manage people (survey recipients), and integrate customer feedback intelligence into CX and product workflows. Delighted is known for simplicity and high response rates.
use_cases: Querying NPS scores and trend data from customer experience analytics agents
Retrieving verbatim feedback and sentiment from product intelligence agents
Triggering survey sends based on customer events from CRM workflow automation agents
Integrating Delighted CX data into support ticketing and product roadmap agents
not_for: Complex multi-question enterprise surveys (use Qualtrics or Medallia)
Real-time in-app feedback without Delighted's web SDK
best_when: A product or CX team using Delighted wants AI agents to surface NPS signals, analyze detractor patterns, and integrate feedback intelligence into retention and product workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Survey response data including verbatim comments contains personal opinions. Handle with care and comply with GDPR/CCPA for respondent data.

auth.notes: Delighted HTTP Basic Auth with API key as username (no password needed). API keys from account settings.

pricing.notes: Freemium NPS platform. Generous free tier. Acquired by Qualtrics — Qualtrics integration available.

performance.rate_limits: Delighted API: 60 req/min for most endpoints

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Survey verbatim responses contain personal opinions — GDPR compliance for EU respondents
No public MCP server — REST API or SDK integration required
Simple Basic Auth with API key as username — handle token securely
Rate limit: 60 req/min — throttle for bulk response retrieval
Delighted is Qualtrics-owned — deep integration with Qualtrics platform available
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer survey responses including verbatim feedback. SOC2, GDPR. Basic Auth with API key. Respondent data deletion must be supported for GDPR.

security_score_components.security_notes: Survey response data with verbatim feedback. SOC2, GDPR. Basic Auth API key. GDPR deletion support required.
